language.hint: zh-CN for Chinese, en for English

render_enabled.description: Enable score image rendering / 启用评分图片渲染
render_enabled.hint: When disabled, falls back to text comparison output

render_scale.description: Image render scale / 图片渲染缩放倍数

render_width.description: Score card render width / 评分卡渲染宽度

flaresolverr_host.description: FlareSolverr host address / FlareSolverr 主机地址
flaresolverr_host.hint: Empty or 'localhost' = auto install. Docker users: 'flaresolverr'

flaresolverr_port.hint: Default 8191. Match your FlareSolverr container port

flaresolverr_mode.description: FlareSolverr connection mode / 连接模式
flaresolverr_mode.hint: never=不连接, once=仅首次尝试(默认), always=每次都尝试

summary_cache_ttl.description: Game summary cache TTL (seconds) / 对局评分缓存时间(秒)
summary_cache_ttl.hint: 失败结果缓存时间，到期后自动重试。设为0则禁用缓存

pypi_mirror.description: PyPI mirror for auto-installing Playwright / Playwright 自动安装的 PyPI 镜像源
pypi_mirror.hint: 留空则使用默认 PyPI。国内用户建议保留清华源

chromium_download_host.description: Chromium download host for Playwright / Playwright Chromium 浏览器下载镜像
chromium_download_host.hint: 留空则使用 Playwright 默认源。国内用户可改为 https://cdn.npmmirror.com/binaries/playwright

api_timeout_default.description: API request timeout (seconds) / API 请求超时时间(秒)
api_timeout_default.hint: 对 aoe4world.com 的请求超时，网络环境差可调大

api_timeout_leaderboard.description: Leaderboard API timeout (seconds) / 排行榜请求超时时间(秒)
api_timeout_leaderboard.hint: 排行榜数据量大，默认30秒

data_cache_ttl.description: Game data cache TTL (seconds) / 游戏数据缓存时间(秒)
data_cache_ttl.hint: 文明/单位/建筑/科技等数据的缓存过期时间，到期后自动刷新。设为0则每次重启才刷新

myciv_analysis_games.description: Recent games for /aoe4 me -civ analysis / /aoe4 me -civ 分析的最近对局数
myciv_analysis_games.hint: 分析最近N场的文明胜率分布，范围2~50
